specific_question: How much time will MediConn's non-reviewed data and system integrations take to be reviewed against the new CPPA requirements by Q1 2026?
answer: MediConn will take approximately 3 months for the non-reviewed data and system integrations to be reviewed against the new CPPA requirements by Q1 2026.
justification: This timeline indicates that MediConn has a defined, time-bound remediation plan for the remaining reviews. Completing them by Q1 2026 ensures the company can transition to the compliance implementation and validation phases before the CPPA is enacted.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
